subject: Sunlit canyon of red sandstone cliffs and rock spires under a hazy bright sky
description: A natural canyon scene rendered in warm earth tones. Towering red and ochre sandstone cliffs flank a narrow valley, with weathered rock columns and stratified mesa walls catching the light. Sparse scrub vegetation clings to the canyon floor and ledges. The sky above is pale and washed-out, suggesting midday heat. No figures are present — the image is a pure landscape vista of arid Mediterranean-style highlands consistent with the Theros plane's geography.
foreground: red sandstone canyon floor with scattered scrub brush and rocky outcrops
background: tall layered sandstone cliffs and spires receding into a hazy bright sky
